mapper.select: SELECT * FROM dim_nodes WHERE node_id = #{nodeId}
SELECT * FROM dim_nodes WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY update_time DESC
SELECT * FROM dim_nodes WHERE is_mobile = 1 ORDER BY update_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dim_nodes WHERE is_active = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dim_nodes WHERE affiliation_type = #{affiliationType}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dim_nodes WHERE country = #{country}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dim_nodes WHERE is_mobile = 1

SELECT node_id as nodeId, callsign, latitude, longitude, is_active as isActive, node_rank as nodeRank, affiliation_type as affiliationType, country FROM dim_nodes WHERE latitude BETWEEN #{query.minLat} AND #{query.maxLat} AND longitude BETWEEN #{query.minLng} AND #{query.maxLng} AND latitude IS NOT NULL AND longitude IS NOT NULL AND is_active = 1
AND node_rank IN ('Core', 'Active')
AND (affiliation_type = 'System' OR node_rank = 'Core')
ORDER BY CASE WHEN node_rank = 'Core' THEN 1 WHEN node_rank = 'Active' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, CASE WHEN affiliation_type = 'System' THEN 1 WHEN affiliation_type = 'Club' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END LIMIT 2000

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dim_nodes WHERE latitude BETWEEN #{query.minLat} AND #{query.maxLat} AND longitude BETWEEN #{query.minLng} AND #{query.maxLng} AND latitude IS NOT NULL AND longitude IS NOT NULL AND is_active = 1

SELECT continent as dimensionName, COUNT(*) as totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN is_active = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as activeCount, ROUND( SUM(CASE WHEN is_active = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2 ) as activeRate FROM dim_nodes WHERE continent IS NOT NULL GROUP BY continent ORDER BY totalCount DESC

SELECT country as dimensionName, COUNT(*) as totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN is_active = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as activeCount, ROUND( SUM(CASE WHEN is_active = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2 ) as activeRate FROM dim_nodes WHERE country IS NOT NULL GROUP BY country ORDER BY totalCount DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT COUNT(*) as totalNodes, SUM(CASE WHEN is_active = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as activeNodes FROM dim_nodes

SELECT node_id as nodeId, callsign, latitude, longitude, is_active as isActive, node_rank as nodeRank, affiliation_type as affiliationType, country FROM dim_nodes WHERE latitude IS NOT NULL AND longitude IS NOT NULL ORDER BY CASE WHEN node_rank = 'Core' THEN 1 WHEN node_rank = 'Active' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, CASE WHEN affiliation_type = 'System' THEN 1 WHEN affiliation_type = 'Club' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END

SELECT node_id as nodeId, callsign, latitude, longitude, is_active as isActive, node_rank as nodeRank, affiliation_type as affiliationType, country FROM dim_nodes WHERE latitude IS NOT NULL AND longitude IS NOT NULL AND is_active = 1
AND node_rank IN ('Core', 'Active') AND (affiliation_type = 'System' OR node_rank = 'Core')
AND node_rank IN ('Core', 'Active', 'Transient')
ORDER BY CASE WHEN node_rank = 'Core' THEN 1 WHEN node_rank = 'Active' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, CASE WHEN affiliation_type = 'System' THEN 1 WHEN affiliation_type = 'Club' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END
LIMIT 500
LIMIT 1000
LIMIT 2000
LIMIT 3000

SELECT node_id as nodeId, callsign, latitude, longitude, is_active as isActive, node_rank as nodeRank, affiliation_type as affiliationType, country FROM dim_nodes WHERE latitude IS NOT NULL AND longitude IS NOT NULL AND latitude != 0 AND longitude != 0 ORDER BY CASE WHEN node_rank = 'Core' THEN 1 WHEN node_rank = 'Active' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, CASE WHEN affiliation_type = 'System' THEN 1 WHEN affiliation_type = 'Club' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END
